productDisplayName: Cobblerz Women Beige & Pink Peep Toes
description: A pair of beige and pink peep toes with low top styling and buckle fastening Synthetic leather upper with forefoot straps that has cut-out detail, has an ankle loop with a tang clasp Soft footbed with branding on the heel Tough, textured outsole with a stiletto heel and cap Warranty: 30 days from the date of purchase, against manufacturing defects only
